title: AI Tooling & Personal Workflow Automation
summary: Self-built operations stack — Claude + Gumloop + Notion + Granola + Slack — running unattended automations for portfolio updates and capture workflows.
highlights: Built the Brave Captain Gumloop agent — runs every Friday at 4 PM PT, auto-updates the Capture Hub and portfolio brief without manual intervention
Custom Notion-integrated skills powering ops workflows (vendor sync, weekly construction updates, portfolio capture)
Claude-powered agents handle multi-tool orchestration across Gmail, Calendar, Slack, Notion, Granola, and Drive
Full ops automation stack with no engineering support

title: Multi-Office Vendor Directory Automation
summary: Designed and deployed an automated Gmail-to-Notion vendor sync working across SF, NYC, and SLC offices.
highlights: Auto-assigns contacts to the right office based on which team member is CC'd or by email signature address
Includes duplicate detection against the existing Notion vendor database
Captures Company, Email, Phone, Address, and Website per contact
Filters out cold contacts by checking prior correspondence history

title: Lease & Code Compliance Judgment
summary: Identified a roof egress safety issue and used lease provisions to assign liability correctly.
highlights: Flagged that locking the roof would remove a required means of egress for 28 occupants
Cited Lease Section 11.3(b) — landlord responsibility for code compliance in common areas
Recommended formal landlord escalation with paper trail; offered fire department loop-in as backup
Demonstrated risk/liability analysis beyond standard ops execution

title: Stakeholder Transition Stewardship
summary: Kept critical-path decisions moving when a key broker stepped back mid-project.
highlights: Routed outstanding decisions through the backup stakeholder after primary broker stepped back
Maintained continuity on construction approvals without a stakeholder gap
Managed handoff without escalation to leadership
